name: opsgate
description: opsgate MCP (runtime + admin surfaces) with usage and credential-lifecycle skills.

interface.shortDescription: Policy-gated HTTP/SQL credential broker for LLM clients.
interface.longDescription: Connects the opsgate MCP (runtime /mcp + admin /mcp/admin) so the agent calls HTTP APIs and Postgres by alias without ever seeing secrets or target URLs. Ships the opsgate-basic (read-only usage) and opsgate-admin (credential lifecycle) skills.
